description_long: This is a large, multi-tiered shelving unit with five horizontal shelves supported by vertical side frames. The shelves are made of a light wood material, and the supporting structure appears to be metal, painted white. The design is open, with no backing or side panels, allowing for easy access from the front and sides. The shelves are evenly spaced, providing ample storage or display space for various items. The overall look is modern and functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as shops, garages, or public spaces. The unit is freestanding and does not feature any doors, drawers, or enclosed compartments.
description: A large, open, multi-shelf unit with light wood shelves and white metal supports, designed for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing five wide, evenly spaced wooden shelves supported by white metal frames, with open access and no backing.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the shelves and the angled white metal supports, emphasizing the open structure.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open back and the full width of the shelves, with no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, highlighting the vertical and diagonal metal supports.
